cards.title: Built on Practice, Not Theory
cards.text: Our methodology comes from direct experience building a brand from the ground up — using generative AI as a core operational tool, without external funding or a traditional infrastructure. What we offer clients is what we tested on ourselves first.

cards.title: Selective by Design
cards.text: We work with a small number of clients at any one time. Every engagement is bespoke. We do not offer packages or retainers.

cards.title: Recognition
cards.text: Our work has been recognised by one of the UK's most established institutions for contribution to the arts, commerce and social progress. Read more in our founder's profile.

cards.title: Proof, Not Promises
cards.text: Our methodology was tested on a real brand, in a real market, under real constraints — not in a lab. Ask us how it played out.

cards.title: Who's Behind This
cards.text: AI Business Studio London is led by Esen Tunalı Sarı, FRSA — Fellow of the Royal Society of Arts. Her work sits at the intersection of generative AI, brand strategy and creative production.
